title: Resolution Authorizing the Local Chief Executive, Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw to Enter Into a Memorandum of Agreement MOA) for and in Behalf of the Municipal Government of Los Baños (MGLB) with Giving Tree Corporation Regarding the Construction and Operation of a Crematorium Facility Inside the Paraiso ng Bayan. (AUTHOR : COUNCILOR GERONIMO A. CICERON,3/07/2022)
